name: Live2D Avatar
description: Loads a configurable Live2D Cubism avatar in the main view and maps Noema state updates to motions, expressions, pose, and lip sync.

configSchema.label: Model Folder
configSchema.description: Select a Live2D model folder. The first .model3.json in the folder is used automatically.

configSchema.label: Scale
configSchema.description: Multiplier applied after automatic viewport fitting. Use values below 1 to leave more breathing room.

configSchema.label: Auto fit
configSchema.description: Keep the model inside the plugin view when the window or task layout changes.

configSchema.label: Fit padding
configSchema.description: Minimum padding between the model bounds and the plugin viewport.

configSchema.label: Max width
configSchema.description: Maximum fraction of the plugin viewport width the model may occupy.

configSchema.label: Max height
configSchema.description: Maximum fraction of the plugin viewport height the model may occupy.

configSchema.label: Offset X
configSchema.description: Horizontal model offset in CSS pixels.

configSchema.label: Offset Y
configSchema.description: Vertical model offset in CSS pixels.

configSchema.label: Lip sync gain
configSchema.description: Multiplier applied to Noema output energy before writing mouth parameters.

configSchema.label: Mouth attack
configSchema.description: How quickly the mouth opens when output energy rises.

configSchema.label: Mouth release
configSchema.description: How quickly the mouth closes when output energy falls.

configSchema.label: Mouse tracking
configSchema.description: Real-time pointer control mode. When enabled, state motions, state poses, and expression hooks are ignored so mouse control stays responsive.

configSchema.label: Focus strength
configSchema.description: Strength passed to the built-in Live2D focus behavior.

configSchema.label: Pointer parameter strength
configSchema.description: Strength for app-style direct mouse parameter mapping.

configSchema.label: Play state motions
configSchema.description: Only applies when Mouse tracking is off. Plays configured motion groups when Noema state changes.

configSchema.label: Idle motion group
configSchema.description: Motion group used while idle. Leave the default unless the model uses different group names.

configSchema.label: Listening motion group
configSchema.description: Motion group used while listening.

configSchema.label: Thinking motion group
configSchema.description: Motion group used while thinking.

configSchema.label: Speaking motion group
configSchema.description: Motion group used while speaking.

configSchema.label: Task motion group
configSchema.description: Motion group used while a task is visible.

configSchema.label: Error motion group
configSchema.description: Motion group used for error states when available.

zh-CN.name: Live2D 形象
zh-CN.description: 在主视图加载可配置的 Live2D Cubism 形象，并把 Noema 状态映射到动作、表情、姿态和口型同步。
zh-CN.pages.advanced.title: 高级模型参数
zh-CN.pages.advanced.description: 模型适配边距、位置、口型平滑、状态 motion 映射
zh-CN.config.modelDir.label: 模型目录
zh-CN.config.modelDir.description: 选择 Live2D 模型文件夹。目录中的第一个 .model3.json 会被自动使用。
zh-CN.config.scale.label: 缩放
zh-CN.config.scale.description: 自动适配视口后额外应用的缩放倍数。低于 1 可留出更多边距。
zh-CN.config.autoFit.label: 自动适配
zh-CN.config.autoFit.description: 窗口或任务布局变化时，让模型保持在插件视图内。
zh-CN.config.fitPadding.label: 适配边距
zh-CN.config.fitPadding.description: 模型边界和插件视口之间的最小距离。
zh-CN.config.maxWidthRatio.label: 最大宽度
zh-CN.config.maxWidthRatio.description: 模型最多占用插件视口宽度的比例。
zh-CN.config.maxHeightRatio.label: 最大高度
zh-CN.config.maxHeightRatio.description: 模型最多占用插件视口高度的比例。
zh-CN.config.offsetX.label: 水平偏移
zh-CN.config.offsetX.description: 模型的水平偏移，单位为 CSS 像素。
zh-CN.config.offsetY.label: 垂直偏移
zh-CN.config.offsetY.description: 模型的垂直偏移，单位为 CSS 像素。
zh-CN.config.lipSyncGain.label: 口型强度
zh-CN.config.lipSyncGain.description: 写入口型参数前，对 Noema 输出能量应用的倍数。
zh-CN.config.lipSyncAttack.label: 张嘴速度
zh-CN.config.lipSyncAttack.description: 输出能量升高时嘴巴张开的速度。
zh-CN.config.lipSyncRelease.label: 闭嘴速度
zh-CN.config.lipSyncRelease.description: 输出能量降低时嘴巴闭合的速度。
zh-CN.config.mouseTracking.label: 鼠标跟随
zh-CN.config.mouseTracking.description: 实时鼠标控制模式。开启后状态动作、状态姿态和表情 hook 会被忽略，以保证鼠标跟随优先且灵敏。
zh-CN.config.focusStrength.label: Focus 强度
zh-CN.config.focusStrength.description: 传给 Live2D 内置 focus 行为的强度。
zh-CN.config.pointerTrackingStrength.label: 指针参数强度
zh-CN.config.pointerTrackingStrength.descripti: 应用式鼠标参数映射的写入强度。
zh-CN.config.stateMotionsEnabled.label: 播放状态动作
zh-CN.config.stateMotionsEnabled.description: 仅在关闭鼠标跟随后生效。Noema 状态变化时播放配置的 motion group。
zh-CN.config.idleMotion.label: 空闲动作组
zh-CN.config.idleMotion.description: 空闲状态使用的 motion group。模型使用不同组名时可在这里覆盖。
zh-CN.config.listeningMotion.label: 聆听动作组
zh-CN.config.listeningMotion.description: 聆听状态使用的 motion group。
zh-CN.config.thinkingMotion.label: 思考动作组
zh-CN.config.thinkingMotion.description: 思考状态使用的 motion group。
zh-CN.config.speakingMotion.label: 说话动作组
zh-CN.config.speakingMotion.description: 说话状态使用的 motion group。
zh-CN.config.taskMotion.label: 任务动作组
zh-CN.config.taskMotion.description: 任务可见时使用的 motion group。
zh-CN.config.errorMotion.label: 错误动作组
zh-CN.config.errorMotion.description: 模型可用时，错误状态使用的 motion group。

en-US.name: Live2D Avatar
en-US.description: Loads a configurable Live2D Cubism avatar in the main view and maps Noema state updates to motions, expressions, pose, and lip sync.
en-US.pages.advanced.title: Advanced Model Parameters
en-US.pages.advanced.description: Model fit, position, lip-sync smoothing, and state motion mapping
en-US.config.modelDir.label: Model Folder
en-US.config.modelDir.description: Select a Live2D model folder. The first .model3.json in the folder is used automatically.
en-US.config.scale.label: Scale
en-US.config.scale.description: Multiplier applied after automatic viewport fitting. Use values below 1 to leave more breathing room.
en-US.config.autoFit.label: Auto Fit
en-US.config.autoFit.description: Keep the model inside the plugin view when the window or task layout changes.
en-US.config.fitPadding.label: Fit Padding
en-US.config.fitPadding.description: Minimum padding between the model bounds and the plugin viewport.
en-US.config.maxWidthRatio.label: Max Width
en-US.config.maxWidthRatio.description: Maximum fraction of the plugin viewport width the model may occupy.
en-US.config.maxHeightRatio.label: Max Height
en-US.config.maxHeightRatio.description: Maximum fraction of the plugin viewport height the model may occupy.
en-US.config.offsetX.label: Offset X
en-US.config.offsetX.description: Horizontal model offset in CSS pixels.
en-US.config.offsetY.label: Offset Y
en-US.config.offsetY.description: Vertical model offset in CSS pixels.
en-US.config.lipSyncGain.label: Lip Sync Gain
en-US.config.lipSyncGain.description: Multiplier applied to Noema output energy before writing mouth parameters.
en-US.config.lipSyncAttack.label: Mouth Attack
en-US.config.lipSyncAttack.description: How quickly the mouth opens when output energy rises.
en-US.config.lipSyncRelease.label: Mouth Release
en-US.config.lipSyncRelease.description: How quickly the mouth closes when output energy falls.
en-US.config.mouseTracking.label: Mouse Tracking
en-US.config.mouseTracking.description: Real-time pointer control mode. When enabled, state motions, state poses, and expression hooks are ignored so mouse control stays responsive.
en-US.config.focusStrength.label: Focus Strength
en-US.config.focusStrength.description: Strength passed to the built-in Live2D focus behavior.
en-US.config.pointerTrackingStrength.label: Pointer Parameter Strength
en-US.config.pointerTrackingStrength.descripti: Strength for app-style direct mouse parameter mapping.
en-US.config.stateMotionsEnabled.label: Play State Motions
en-US.config.stateMotionsEnabled.description: Only applies when Mouse Tracking is off. Plays configured motion groups when Noema state changes.
en-US.config.idleMotion.label: Idle Motion Group
en-US.config.idleMotion.description: Motion group used while idle. Override this if the model uses different group names.
en-US.config.listeningMotion.label: Listening Motion Group
en-US.config.thinkingMotion.label: Thinking Motion Group
en-US.config.speakingMotion.label: Speaking Motion Group
en-US.config.taskMotion.label: Task Motion Group
en-US.config.taskMotion.description: Motion group used while a task is visible.
en-US.config.errorMotion.label: Error Motion Group
en-US.config.errorMotion.description: Motion group used for error states when available.
